title: 第 16 課｜粒子解體：守恆律預測碎片方向｜Landau–Lifshitz 經典力學
description:
粒子自發解體後，碎片會往哪裡走？本課利用動量與能量守恆，說明質心系中的等大反向動量 p₀ = √(2με)，再用 v = V + v₀ 轉換到實驗室系，導出 V 大於 v₀ 時碎片只能出現在前向圓錐內。

本影片為《Landau–Lifshitz 經典力學》教學系列第 16 課（繁體中文版）。

title: Lesson 16 | Particle Disintegration and Conservation Laws | Landau–Lifshitz
description:
Where do the fragments go after a spontaneous particle disintegration? This lesson uses momentum and energy conservation to obtain equal and opposite centre-of-mass momenta p₀ = √(2με), then transforms with v = V + v₀ to show why fragments are confined to a forward cone when V exceeds v₀.

Lesson 16 of the Landau–Lifshitz Classical Mechanics teaching series (English edition).
